mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, c.CPNY_LOCATION AS COMPANY_NAME, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM AR_SHIFT010 a LEFT JOIN HR_COMPANY c ON a.CPNY_ID = c.CPNY_ID LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON a.SHIFT_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON a.SHIFT_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON a.SHIFT_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON a.SHIFT_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' WHERE 1 = 1
AND a.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
AND (a.SHIFT_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR gvi.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%')
ORDER BY a.ORDERNO, a.SHIFT_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_SHIFT010 ( SHIFT_NO, DATATYPE, SHIFT_ID, CPNY_ID, DEPT_DISTINGUISH_NO, DEDUCT_TIME, OT_TIME_START, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, UPDATED_IP, CREATED_IP, OT_ALLOWANCE, SHIFT_SHORTNAME, SHIFT_LENGTH ) VALUES ( #{shiftNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{datatype, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{shiftId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptDistinguishNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deductTime, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{otTimeStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{updatedIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otAllowance, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{shiftShortname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shiftLength, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
